notes: quality: btree_not_null index, precompute=True, Domain class pattern
maintenance: MTBF/MTTR filter performance, recurring copy in write batch risk
rating: raw SQL array_agg bypasses ORM, partial index WHERE consumed IS TRUE
digest: HMAC unsubscribe token, auto-slowdown via res.users.log
resource: rrule interval performance, Odoo 19 schedule_type flex/fixed modes

Returns False base, override in quality_mrp
Links custom model to ir.model

Folder-level access control via res.groups
Service log one2many to fleet.vehicle.log.services
Kanban workflow: new->in progress->done, auto-creates next recurring request
SQL unique constraint prevents duplicate serial numbers
Python filter over maintenance_ids; consider read_group for large datasets

Odoo 19 PropertiesDefinition + Properties for dynamic field schema
Odoo 19 uses archive Boolean instead of active field
Raw SQL array_agg bypasses ORM _read_group limitation on ordered aggregates
Separates pending vs submitted ratings; partial index WHERE consumed IS TRUE
Cascades to delete rating.rating records; cascades to mail.message

Time-windowed satisfaction computation; False = all ratings included
UUID for public portal rating; GET submission removed Odoo 19 to prevent crawler abuse
Auto-slowdown via res.users.log; degrades periodicity daily->weekly->monthly->quarterly
HMAC-based token using tools.hmac - prevents URL forgery on unsubscribe
Context-based datetime ranges; per-period compute with margin vs previous period
Boolean+Value pair pattern; modules extend digest to add KPIs via _inherit

Tracks consumed tips per user for rotation; user_ids += user marks as seen
Bridges any model to resource.resource; bypass_search_access=True for ACL bypass
Batches by calendar; calling per-record loses batch optimization; naive datetime->UTC conversion
calendar_id=False = fully flexible resource; drives all interval computation branches
Override point for hr_contract: split validity by contract periods
calendar_id=False; used to branch interval computation in _attendance_intervals_batch
Odoo 19 new: replaces flexible_hours boolean with flexible/fully_fixed selection
Core engine: rrule(DAILY) + timezone grouping; O(n) per timezone not per resource
Iterates 14-day chunks up to 100 iterations; returns False if hours cannot be planned
